source_levels.label: Ethics, consent and privacy
source_levels.use_case: Required before any assessment, student/minor data or personal profile processing.

source_levels.label: Validated psychometric instrument
source_levels.use_case: Only reviewed, licensed/allowed and age-appropriate instruments may be used in future.

source_levels.label: Educational/reflection framework
source_levels.use_case: Non-diagnostic, non-deterministic self-reflection or learning-support prompts.

source_levels.label: Editorial safe placeholder
source_levels.use_case: Public static copy that does not collect data, score, diagnose or recommend decisions.

source_record_schema.source_domain: ethics | consent | privacy | psychometric_instrument | education | editorial
